stemHtml: What are the functions of the on-board ATSU (Air Traffic Services Unit)? To enable access to all available communications media…

options.a: manage the HMI (Human Machine Interface), and select the appropriate ATC centre for datalink throughout the flight.
options.b: select the appropriate ATC centre for data link throughout the flight, and manage EGPWS warnings.
options.c: manage the HMI (Human Machine Interface), and manage engine thrust.
options.d: select the appropriate ATC centre for data link throughout the flight, and manage engine thrust.
